channel.title: SevenAtSevenLastSection
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SevenAtSevenLastSection, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 6 Manga and Manwha Series for Romantasy Readers
item.description: Romantasy themes have long been a staple of manga and manhwa. Here are six series perfect for romantasy readers.

item.title: 5 Romance Books That Subvert Common Tropes
item.description: These romance books subvert romance novel tropes by playing around with reader expectations and creating unique story elements.

item.title: A Reader’s Guide to Freida McFadden
item.description: Freida McFadden's books are everywhere. But who is the author? Where and how did she begin her writing career?

item.title: ICE Is Buying Warehouses. Communities Are Fighting Back.
item.description: The agency wants to warehouse immigration detainees. Local residents and officials are raising concerns.

item.title: Iowa’s Top Court Ended Court Fees in Dismissed Cases. Politicians Want Them Back
item.description: The state can no longer saddle defendants with court fees when charges are dismissed. Prosecutors are backing legislation to restore them.
